experience.title: Guided by Experience, Driven by Your Success
experience.description: Navigating a new academic journey in a foreign country can be challenging. That's why K-BRIDGE's programs are guided by a network of global alumni who understand exactly what it takes to succeed in Korea.

alumni.title: Our Team of Global Alumni Experts
alumni.description: Our team comprises international alumni who have successfully navigated the Korean higher education system. Their firsthand experience translates into authentic, practical guidance for students taking their first steps in Korea.

cultural.title: Cultural & Educational Exchange
cultural.description: Beyond the classroom, we connect you to a wider world. K-BRIDGE leverages sustainable partnerships to drive meaningful cultural exchanges, making your study abroad experience global.

Hero.title: Your Gateway to Study in Korea
Hero.description: Connect with Korea's leading universities through our comprehensive educational consulting services. We provide end-to-end support for international students pursuing their academic dreams in South Korea.

aboutBridge.title: The bridge between where you are and where you're going.
aboutBridge.subtitle: K-Bridge bridges the gap between your home country and Korean academia, allowing you to simply cross over without the effort of building it yourself.

home.label: You are here
home.title: Home Country
home.description: Confused by Korean admissions, scholarships, and visa rules.

connector.label: K-BRIDGE
connector.title: The Connector
connector.description: Alumni advisors translate the system into a plan built for you.

arrive.label: You arrive here
arrive.title: Studying in Korea
arrive.description: Enrolled, supported, and ready to thrive from day one.

landingPrograms.title: Find Your Path to Korea
landingPrograms.intro: End-to-end support designed to ensure your success throughout your educational journey in Korea

language.title: Korean Language Programs
language.description: Start your journey with comprehensive Korean language programs

degree.title: Find Your Perfect Program
degree.description: Explore degree programs and courses at top Korean universities

footer.tagline: The bridge between where you are and where you're going. End-to-end consulting for international students pursuing higher education in South Korea.

newsletter.headline: Your Gateway to Study in Korea
newsletter.subheadline: Get application tips, scholarship updates, and program news delivered straight to your inbox.

programsHero.title: Find the pathway that fits your goals.
programsHero.subtitle: Whether you're just starting to learn Korean or planning your path to a career here, K-BRIDGE walks each step of the journey with you.

howWeSupport.title: Studying abroad is a big step. You don't take it alone.
howWeSupport.subtitle: Every international student arrives with the same question: "will I be okay here?" Our job is to make sure the answer is yes.

settling.title: Settling In Without the Stress
settling.description: Moving to a new country isn't easy — language barriers, paperwork, and unfamiliar systems can feel overwhelming. We help you handle the practical hurdles so you can focus on what you came here for.

beyondClassroom.title: Beyond the Classroom
beyondClassroom.description: Studying abroad is more than coursework. From daily life to mental well-being, our alumni advisors share what they wish they had known — and stay close through the ups and downs.

oneTeam.title: One Team, One Plan
oneTeam.description: You shouldn't have to chase information across schools, government offices, and agencies. We coordinate the moving parts — admissions, visa, housing, and career steps — so your plan stays in one place.

healthSafety.title: Health & Safety, Covered
healthSafety.description: Korea's national health insurance is required for international students, and it's also genuinely good. We help you enroll the right way so a hospital visit never becomes a financial worry.

programTracks.title: Four tracks. One bridge.
programTracks.subtitle: From a few months of Korean to a full graduate degree — pick the path that fits your goals.

language.title: Start with the language
language.description: Whether you're beginning from zero or polishing what you already know, our partner language institutes meet you at your level.

undergraduate.title: Earn your bachelor's in Korea
undergraduate.description: Study at one of Korea's top universities and earn an internationally recognized degree. We help you choose a major, prepare your application, and navigate scholarships.

graduate.title: Take your career further
graduate.description: Master's and PhD programs across engineering, business, the arts, and more. Many programs offer substantial scholarships and English-taught tracks.

exchange.title: Experience Korea, briefly
exchange.description: Not ready for a full degree? Exchange and short-term programs let you live, study, and explore Korea for a semester or summer.

history.paragraph1: Founded in 2014, K-BRIDGE opened its first language institute in Hanoi in 2016 and expanded to a larger campus in 2019. We've been growing steadily ever since.
history.paragraph2: Today, we partner with universities across Korea to support international students from their first inquiry to graduation.

credentials.label: Officially recognized by
credentials.associationOne: Bareun International Student Recruitment Support Association
credentials.text: Member of the {one} and partner of the {two}

principle.quote: The hardest part of studying abroad isn't the studying. It's everything around it. That's what we're here for.

globalPresence.title: Our Headquarters & Branches
globalPresence.subtitle: Four locations across three countries, with one shared goal: to make Korean education accessible from wherever you call home.

beyondOffices.label: Beyond our offices
beyondOffices.prefix: We also recruit and welcome students from
beyondOffices.suffix: , and partner with universities across China and Vietnam beyond our office cities.

osan.description: Where every student journey lands. Our Korean team coordinates university admissions, visa support, housing arrangements, and ongoing student care from arrival to graduation.

hanoi.description: Our flagship Vietnam office runs a direct Korean language program — students prepare for Korean academic life before they ever leave home.

haiDuong.description: A second Vietnamese hub focused on language training and cultural adaptation, ensuring students arrive in Korea ready to thrive.

qingdao.description: Our Qingdao team works directly with Chinese students and partners with local education institutions to expand our network across China.

ourTeam.title: Meet the people behind your journey.
ourTeam.subtitle: A small, focused team across Korea, Vietnam, and China — committed to walking with each student from first inquiry to graduation.
ourTeam.supportNote: Plus a dedicated team of Korean language instructors, English instructors, and student support staff across our Vietnam and China offices.

leeYongJoo.name: Lee Yong-Joo
leeYongJoo.bio: Leading K-BRIDGE's vision to make Korean education accessible to students across Asia and beyond.

title.line2: We'd love to hear from you.

contactHero.subtitle: Whether you're a student exploring options, a parent researching paths, or a university interested in partnering with us — we're a message away.

formHeader.title: Send us a message
formHeader.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll route your message to the right person on our team.

fields.name: Name
fields.messagePlaceholder: Tell us a little about your situation or question...

submit.responseTime: We'll get back to you within 1–3 business days.

otherWays.title: Or reach us another way
otherWays.subtitle: Prefer email or messaging? Pick whichever works best for you.

messaging.title: Chat with us
messaging.subtitle: Find us on your favorite messaging app — we respond fastest here.

consultationCost.question: Is the initial consultation free?
consultationCost.answer: Yes — the first consultation with one of our advisors is completely free. We'll talk through your background, goals, and timeline, then help you understand which programs and pathways might fit you best. No payment, no commitment.

languages.question: What languages can I communicate in?
languages.answer: Our team can support you in English, Korean, Vietnamese, and Chinese. When you submit the form, just let us know your preferred language and we'll match you with the right advisor.

universityPartnerships.question: I represent a university — how do we partner with K-BRIDGE?
universityPartnerships.answer: We're always open to new institutional partnerships. Use the form on this page and select 'University or institution' to tell us a bit about your institution and the kind of collaboration you have in mind. Our partnerships team will respond directly.

bottomNote.prefix: Have a question that's not here?
